description.value: The creature possesses the standard suite of Mechanicus cybernetic implants: cranial circuitry, cyber-mantle, electro-graft, electoo inductors, and potentia coil. These provide various bonuses to Tech-Use tests, interfacing with machinery, and other technological interactions as detailed in the core rules.

system.benefit: The creature has standard Mechanicus implants: cranial circuitry, cyber-mantle, electro-graft, electoo inductors, and potentia coil, providing bonuses to technology interaction.
